blocks.text: Norway out of World Cup — but Carlsen and Suzuka beckon
Gyökeres' hat-trick sent Sweden through as Norway's World Cup qualifying dream ended in heartbreak. A painful knockout — but a stacked week of sport lies ahead.
🏎️ Fri 03:30 — Aramco Japanese Grand Prix at Suzuka — Russell leads Antonelli by just 4 points in the early 2026 title race

blocks.label: 🚴 Spring Classics — Norwegian colours
items: Fri 11:52 — E3 Saxo Classic: Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard on the cobbles
Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem: Wærenskjold's power course, Norway's best shot this week
Wed 11:55 — Dwars door Vlaanderen: Wærenskjold again in the Ronde warm-up

blocks.text: ♟️ Wed 16:00 — Magnus Carlsen opens FIDE Candidates 2026 — World Championship challenger crown at stake [★5]
